---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the project
title: '[Feature] <short description>'
labels: ['enhancement']
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...").

### Describe the Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How does this improve the project?

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context

Add any other context, designs, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
